allies.rationale_text: Cognitive-load-theory explains the beneficial side of lock-in: chunked, repeatable patterns can become useful schemas that reduce mental friction.
allies.source_quote: Scaffolding and chunking information into small, manageable units facilitate the transfer of new knowledge into long-term memory, effectively establishing a beneficial cognitive lock-in.

allies.rationale_text: Checklists turn beneficial lock-in into explicit repeatable structure so execution does not depend on rediscovering the routine each time.
allies.source_quote: Systematizing principles and using checklists locks work processes into consistent, repeatable patterns.

antagonists.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking breaks unhealthy lock-in by stripping away inherited convention and asking what the path would look like from fundamental facts.
antagonists.source_quote: This approach explicitly breaks the lock of convention by stripping away assumptions to leave only fundamental facts and the desired outcome.

antagonists.rationale_text: Optionality resists lock-in when irreversible commitments are closing off adaptive branch choices too early.
antagonists.source_quote: lock-in conflicts with optionality (optionality) when irreversible commitments eliminate adaptive branch choices.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lock-in conflicts with optionality when irreversible commitments eliminate adaptive branch choices.
structured_tensions.source_quote: lock-in vs optionality: lock-in conflicts with optionality (optionality) when irreversible commitments eliminate adaptive branch choices.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lock-in conflicts with first-principles-thinking when conventional frameworks are preserved by inertia rather than stripped back to fundamental facts and the desired outcome.
structured_tensions.source_quote: lock-in vs first-principles-thinking: lock-in conflicts with first-principles-thinking (first principles thinking) when conventional frameworks are preserved by inertia rather than stripped back to fundamental facts and the desired outcome.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on beneficial procedural stickiness, reversal-cost risks, and two clean explicit tensions against adaptive reframing.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor migration or path-dependence overlays beyond the bounded first-order allies and explicit source tensions.
open_questions: The source also names multidisciplinary reframing, but first-principles-thinking and optionality were the cleaner bounded antagonists inside the current curated surface.
